service.name: World Bank API
service.description_for_ai: Free economic and development data for 200+ countries. GDP, population, poverty, education, health indicators from 1960 to present. No API key needed. Use for economic research, data visualization, country comparisons.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Get economic indicator data for countries and years. GDP, inflation, unemployment, exports, population, education, health.

country.description: ISO 2-letter country code or all for all countries. e.g. RU, US, DE, CN

format.description: Response format: json, xml, or csv

per_page.description: Results per page. Check API docs for maximum allowed.

capabilities.description_for_ai: Search available World Bank indicators by keyword.

format.description: Response format: json, xml, or csv

per_page.description: Results per page. Check API docs for maximum allowed.

agent_hints.common_indicators: NY.GDP.MKTP.CD=GDP current USD, SP.POP.TOTL=Total population, FP.CPI.TOTL.ZG=Inflation %, SL.UEM.TOTL.ZS=Unemployment %, SE.ADT.LITR.ZS=Literacy rate
agent_hints.response_format: Response is array of 2 elements: [0]=metadata, [1]=data array
